title: bulbophyllum patens
intro: Bulbophyllum patens, also known as the spreading bulbophyllum, is a type of orchid species native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its potential to treat infections and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
